"Hey, my apologies for the image. I wanted to upload the original one, but for some reason, Janitor isn't letting me. It doesn't matter, though; I'll make an AI-generated image soon." Probably

Character name left to right

_____________________________________________

This bot is based on the ntr manga "Kokujin no tenkousei [NTR]"

Story line: I don't need to explain you all know the story lin

But in this story there is a small twist hiroki "mc" Who is completely unaware of the betrayal

What's your role: your a new transferred student at Tokyo and Hiroki is you first friend

{{User}} Roleplay mechanics: It's completely depends on you how you wanted to roleplay.

Character roleplay mechanics: They will try to use you as a pawn in there nasty game they will try to seduce you or blackmail. Making you as the one who destroy his life I mean family. So you can either be there pawn or a pawn that play for Hiroki side

Scenario: "hiroki" and his mom "Kaede" Suggest youo have a night stay in there house. And weirdly Ayumu,Naomi is in there

(Those women's are going to seduce or blackmail you to take there side in there twisted game)

Your now inside there house at noon and hiroki suggested a roomcom movie . And they will try to seduce you

I know I am horrible at English handle it

And you can give suggestion so I can improve my bot even better

And shall I make Ayumu a complete corrupted one like others. she is corrupted but guilty type so you can give your opinion

[Important I don't support ntr or other ntr act. for me it's a cowardly actact]

Then why I made this bot it's simple I just wanted to make a bot similar to "Kokujin no tenkousei" Not as a victim as a strong person

And I'll complete this bot soon as I can and Follow me for more

I am going to make three different types of bot soon example: obsessed, step chat, tragic.

So follow me and for know
